label: rst_map_after_dust
note: Baseline after Dust Bowl sample; paused on R.S.T. map before timing the rest of the island.

label: rst_turbine_preview
note: After preview-only click on the top red R.S.T. region; use this to measure map-to-preview UI cost.

label: rst_turbine_commit_failed_map
note: Commit-preview attempt returned to the R.S.T. map instead of deployment; likely selected/cleared a non-startable or already-detailed panel. Cost from preview mark: 17 seconds.

label: rst_razor_plain_preview
note: Razor Shore plain preview after region-repeat attempt; not deployment. It shows Defensive Shields and Block Vek Spawning 3 times. Cost from previous failed-map mark: 17 seconds.

label: rst_razor_deploy_research_gate
note: Successful Razor start/deploy path. Segment placed all mechs and clicked Confirm, then stopped on pending SpiderlingEgg1 research before turn 1. Delta from plain preview: 28 seconds.

label: rst_after_razor_map
note: Razor Shore completed and returned to R.S.T. map. Delta from combat/research gate: 2m22s; includes combat after resolving SpiderlingEgg1, reward clear, and map return.

label: rst_pause_confirm_after_patch
note: Pause guard check after Razor and timing-tool patch. Timer advanced only 1s from live map mark; confirms the run was paused while thinking/building.

label: rst_recommend_peek_no_bridge_map
note: recommend_mission pause-map-peek resumed to live map and paused again, but bridge returned NO_ISLAND_MAP. Visual evidence gives reliable remaining-region coordinates. Cost from pause baseline: 6s in-game.

label: rst_disintegration_preview_dialogue
note: Disintegration Flats preview after preview-only route and micro-peek. Dialogue is open; objectives are Destroy 2 Vek Egg Sacks and Protect the Power Generator; Wind Storm. Cost from map visual peek: 7s.

label: rst_disintegration_deploy_mismatch
note: After commit_preview_dialogue_twice and immediate pause, deployment screen is live at 0:42:17. Preview had shown Disintegration Flats Wind/Egg Sacks, but deployment objectives show Destroy 2 mountains and Kill at least 5 Enemies; record as route/preview mismatch. Preview-to-deploy cost: 10s.

label: rst_force_reward_stalled_dialogue
note: Mission_Force reward screen with dialogue overlay. Segment completed combat and one reward_continue click stalled because dialogue remained. Delta from deployment mark: 3m24s; includes 5-turn combat, reward arrival, and failed reward click.

label: rst_force_pod_panel_after_lower_continue
note: Lower bottom_continue succeeded where reward_continue missed, advancing to Pod Recovered. Huge leak: reward/dialogue stall to pod panel cost 2m07s because timer kept ticking on reward UI. Need reward-dialogue/bottom-continue handling.

label: rst_after_force_map_paused
note: Returned to R.S.T. map and paused after opening pod and clearing reward. Delta from pod panel: 1m03s. Full preview-dialogue mark to next map: 6m44s; much of that was reward/pod UI leakage, not combat.

label: rst_visible_start_failed_blind_dialogue_click
note: Visible-text route_start failed after blindly clicking dialogue_textbox when no dialogue was present. That click selected completed Dust Bowl instead of starting Disintegration; detector saw only 320 yellow pixels and no Start Mission. Cost from map return: 18s.

label: rst_dialogue_dismiss_closes_preview
note: Safe left-side dialogue dismiss avoided Dust pass-through, but dismissing Disintegration advisor dialogue returned to the plain map instead of exposing Start Mission. Correct future sequence: click region for dialogue, dismiss safely, then click the region again and commit/start. Delta includes retries while building detector/hotspot fix.

label: rst_disintegration_deploy_after_two_stage_dialogue
note: Two-stage Disintegration start worked: after safe dialogue dismissal returned to map, re-clicking the same region and using preview-board-twice entered deployment. Delta from map-after-dialogue mark: 21s. Mission is Wind, 5 turns, egg sacks + generator.

label: rst_disintegration_threat_audit_block
note: Disintegration/Wind stopped on THREAT_AUDIT_BLOCKED at turn 3 after two End Turns. Delta from deployment: 2m45s. Remaining warning: Firefly at C3 still targeting building C4; do not End Turn until reviewed. Segment wall time 107.68s.
